scenarios.prompt: Call serialization_probe with timeout 0, replace_all false, offset 0, multiline false, and type null.

tool.name: serialization_probe
tool.description: You MUST call this tool exactly once with the exact values requested by the user. Do not convert, normalize, or omit values.

type.description: Must be literal JSON null, never an empty string, text, or omission.

alibaba-coding.reason: qwen3.5-plus currently serializes null as an empty string on the Alibaba coding endpoint
